name: example-host-ops
doc: Example host-op declaration. Put a file like this beside your scripts (or one directory up, e.g. content/ext-grammar.json) — `lvnconv validate` auto-detects it, the panel's editor completes and documents the ops, and declared `ext` commands validate like built-ins instead of warning as unknown. The declaration never changes compilation: `ext` ops still need LvnOps.Register in the host game.

minigame.doc: Runs a host mini-game; the story pauses until the game calls Resume().

vibrate.doc: Haptic pulse on devices that support it; a silent no-op elsewhere.
